nodes.label: AI as debugging assistant
nodes.grounding_span: AI is much faster for things like debugging than manually combing through a large codebase

nodes.label: AI as writing and grammar assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated verbose or imprecise scientific prose
nodes.grounding_span: AI hasn't quite mastered scientific writing yet, as it often isn't concise enough and tends to add unnecessary fluff

nodes.label: AI as formatting and synthesizing tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a fantastic resource for LaTeX formatting in physics and maths research

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI limited to grounded existing science without creative leaps
nodes.grounding_span: AI's approach is very grounded in existing science, but doesn't seem to be able to take the creative step in theoretical research

nodes.label: Verification-oriented — cross-checks AI outputs against other sources
nodes.grounding_span: checking the code runs, that its result makes physical sense, and is sensible compared to other outputs
